about.plan_goal: My goal is to build solutions that genuinely help people
about.plan_project: First up: an AI-powered real estate platform that goes beyond price — neighbourhood, safety, school zones, everything current portals ignore.
about.plan_objective: The goal is to cut down the thousands of hours people spend browsing property portals just to find a good home.
about.erasmus_description: Right now I'm on Erasmus in Slovenia.
about.title1: When you combine curiosity, creativity and determination
